operations.chart.title: Departures by month (recent)
operations.disclaimer: This dashboard is for research and general information only. Fery is an independent open-source project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by the Société des traversiers du Québec (STQ) or any ferry operator. Figures come from data gathered through public interfaces and local processing; they are not official STQ releases. Automated and AI-assisted outputs may be incomplete or wrong. For schedules, fares, service notices, and any travel decisions, rely on the official STQ website and channels.
